# amiGhostAI
> Ghost Code & Dependency Audit — AI-powered dead code scanner

## What is amiGhostAI?
amiGhostAI is a dual-engine AI code auditor that detects dead code, phantom dependencies, and security vulnerabilities. Two AI models (Grok + DeepSeek) analyze independently — findings are only delivered when both engines agree.

## Features
- Dead code detection (unused functions, orphaned exports, unreachable branches)
- Phantom dependency scanning (unused packages bloating bundles)
- Security ghost scan (hardcoded secrets, deprecated crypto, known CVEs)
- Dockerfile & infrastructure audit
- Bundle bloat analysis with lightweight alternatives

## Architecture
- Dual-engine: Grok 4.5 (xAI) + DeepSeek
- Anti-confabulation: trigram-cosine concordance >= 0.45 required
- Stateless: code snippets processed in real-time, never stored

## Compliance
- EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Art. 50 — limited-risk, full transparency
- GDPR (Reg. 2016/679) — minimal data, no code storage

## Links
- Website: https://amighostai.com
- API: https://amighostai-api-production.up.railway.app
- Contact: hello@amighostai.com
